title: pityrocarpa gonoacantha
intro: Pityrocarpa gonoacantha, also known as the "Santa Helena bush", is a shrub native to the Brazilian Cerrado region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are said to have various health benefits. The health benefits of Pityrocarpa gonoacantha include wound healing, skin care, and potential anti-cancer properties. It is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion for herbal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
